simulation_script.step_1: Filter the 'Hard' question array to ensure at least 18 (30%) of the 60 MCQs are high-rigor.
simulation_script.step_2: Apply the Unit Weighting percentages to select the specific number of questions from each unit folder.
simulation_script.step_3: Randomize the 'Correct Answer' positions to ensure an even distribution of A, B, C, and D.
simulation_script.step_4: Inject 'Trap Answers' into the distractors (e.g., forgetting to divide by 2 in stoichiometry).
